headline: Are NIKE's Inventory Fixes Boosting Global Profitability Yet?

headline: Asurint Appoints Industry Leader Richard Seldon to Its Board of Directors
summary: CLEVELAND, Ohio, April 20, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Asurint (“Asurint”), an industry-leading provider of background screening solutions, today announced the appointment of Richard Seldon to Asurint’s Board of Directors. Richard Seldon brings a wealth of experience and strategic insight in helping transform companies by driving growth, profitability, and innovation.
